clock_policy.gpu_note: torch.cuda.is_available()==False in this environment (CPU-only torch build, no nvidia-smi on PATH) -- CUDA synchronize calls are not applicable here; if run later on a GPU host, torch.cuda.synchronize() must bracket every GPU timing region before/after
clock_policy.cold_warm_separation: cold = first ingest of a video (no .npz cache hit); warm = index loaded from an existing cache. Never averaged together in per_method_latency_summary.csv.
rules: Do not report zero latency for any executed method.
Do not reuse another method's timing record.
Do not combine CPU and GPU timing into one field.
Do not compare a warm proposed-method run against a cold baseline run.
Record both the sum of component timers and an independently measured wall-clock total; a mismatch flags an uninstrumented gap.

note_clip_reranking_timer: clip_reranking timer field is reserved for when configs/peak_span_modes.json's raw_clip_same_pool/clip_in_ppr_topk are implemented; until then it will read null/not-applicable rather than a fabricated value.
implementation_status: Instrumentation points registered here; not yet inserted into iris/ source (that is code work, out of scope for a SETUP ONLY task) -- see setup_report.md remaining blockers.
